items.summary: Update the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) so that the bottom section of the footer — where the 'Admin Sign In' link, visitor counters, and copyright text are displayed — has a background color that provides sufficient contrast for all text to be clearly readable. If the current footer background is dark (e.g., charcoal #2C2C2C), ensure all text and links in that area use a light color (e.g., warm beige #F5F0E8 or white #FFFFFF). If the footer background is light, use charcoal #2C2C2C for text. The 'Admin Sign In' link in particular must be fully visible without hovering, scrolling, or any user interaction. Apply consistent contrast-compliant color tokens from the existing design system to all text elements in the footer bottom bar.
